records.ety: [AS. erwicga; ere ear + wicga beetle, worm: cf. Prov. E. erri-wiggle.]

defs: Any insect of the genus Forficula and related genera, belonging to the order Dermaptera (formerly Euplexoptera). They have elongated bodies and a prominent pair of curved pincers at the rear of their abdomen.
In America, any small chilopodous myriapod, esp. of the genus Geophilus. See Geophilus
notes: ☞ Both insects are so called from the supposition that they creep into the human ear.

defs: A whisperer of insinuations; a secret counselor.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Earwigged (ēr"wgd`); p. pr. & vb. n. Earwigging (ēr"wg*gng).]

defs: To influence, or attempt to influence, by whispered insinuations or private talk.
